---
title: "trains"
author: "Ishika Ravat"
format: html
execute:
  echo: false
---

This study examines attitudes towards immigration. The key covariate of interest is exposure towards Spanish-speakers, and the outcome is measured in the average causal effect of anti-immigration attitudes. A potential weakness is that the survey may not actually measure the attitudes towards immigration, just the answers to the questions in the survey.



```{r}
#| message: false
library(tidyverse)
library(tidymodels)
library(broom)
library(primer.data)
```

```{r}
glimpse(trains)
```
